command: pwd && ls -la /home/node/.openclaw/workspace-ax003 && echo '---' && if [ -f /workspace/notes/billing-sync-triage.md ]; then sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/notes/billing-sync-triage.md; else echo 'missing /workspace/notes/billing-sync-triage.md'; fi

d=$(date -u +%F); y=$(date -u -d 'yesterday' +%F 2>/dev/null || python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
print((datetime.now(timezone.utc)-timedelta(days=1)).strftime('%F'))
PY
); for f in SOUL.md USER.md memory/$d.md memory/$y.md; do echo "---FILE:$f"; [ -f "$f" ] && sed -n '1,220p' "$f" || echo missing; done
